name: Bachelor of Education
eligibility: Bachelor's degree with minimum 50% marks in Sciences / Social Sciences / Humanities, or Bachelor's in Engineering/Technology with 55% marks with specialization in Science and Mathematics.
description: The B.Ed programme prepares graduates for teaching at secondary and senior secondary levels. It combines theory with extensive practice teaching.

name: Master of Education
eligibility: B.Ed / B.A.B.Ed / B.Sc.B.Ed / B.El.Ed with minimum 50% marks, or D.El.Ed with an undergraduate degree (50% each).
description: M.Ed is a postgraduate research-oriented programme focusing on advanced educational theory, research methodology, and curriculum development.

name: Bachelor of Arts & Bachelor of Education
eligibility: Minimum 50% marks in Class 12 (10+2) or equivalent from a recognised board.
description: An integrated 4-year programme combining Arts subjects with professional teacher education — ideal for students who want to pursue teaching from the beginning.

name: Bachelor of Science & Bachelor of Education
eligibility: Minimum 50% marks in Class 12 (10+2) with Science subjects (Physics, Chemistry, Biology/Mathematics) from a recognised board.
description: An integrated 4-year programme combining Science subjects with professional teacher education, approved by NCTE and affiliated to Maharaja Chhatrasal Bundelkhand University.
